filesystem_outputs.rule: independent out_root, basetemp, or case output dir per run

opensearch_targets.rule: independent index or unique run-specific target with explicit cleanup

sqlite_queue.rule: independent queue.sqlite3 or queue root per case

spool_queue.rule: independent spool root; do not reuse buckets across cases

fanout_outputs.rule: child outputs and aggregate artifacts stay case-scoped together

saas_and_service_live.rule: independent case identity; no reliance on residual remote state; use explicit cleanup or unique isolation when needed

not_allowed: shared out_root across independent baseline cases
fanout child output collision across cases
